title: Software Developer – DevSecOps & Cloud Platform Engineering

seo.seo_title: Software Developer Jobs in USA – DevSecOps & Cloud Platform Engineer (Full-Time)
seo.meta_description: Apply for full-time Software Developer jobs in the USA. Build secure, cloud-native apps with Kubernetes, Docker, AWS & DevSecOps. 5-8 yrs experience.

content:
Job Overview

We are hiring an experienced Software Developer to join a growing technology team supporting mission-critical platforms across the United States. This full-time Software Developer opportunity suits a professional who enjoys building secure, scalable, and automated software systems. In this Software Developer position, you will design, develop, and maintain cloud-native applications while driving DevSecOps best practices across the software development lifecycle. The role is ideal for a Software Developer who wants to grow a career in platform engineering, cloud infrastructure, and secure software delivery.

Key Responsibilities

This Software Developer will architect, build, and manage Kubernetes clusters and virtual machine infrastructure to support scalable, resilient applications. Identity and access management capabilities must be developed and integrated across multiple systems, including authentication and authorization services. The Software Developer supports DevSecOps pipelines and CI/CD automation for software build, test, integration, and deployment activities, ensuring every release meets security and quality standards.

Day-to-day duties for this Software Developer position include applying security requirements such as patching, STIG implementation, configuration hardening, and vulnerability remediation using industry-standard scanning tools. Close collaboration with cross-functional engineering teams is required to support multiple concurrent software releases while maintaining system reliability, performance, and security across all environments. Platform, application, and infrastructure issues are also troubleshot by the Software Developer, who implements effective corrective actions and root-cause fixes. Contributing to system architecture decisions and providing technical guidance or mentorship to junior developers and engineers rounds out the role.

Partnering closely with DevOps, security, and platform engineering teams, this Software Developer will streamline infrastructure automation, container orchestration, and continuous delivery pipelines. Strong documentation habits, clear communication, and a proactive approach to problem solving are essential for success in this software development role.

Required Skills and Qualifications

  • 5 to 8 years of professional software development experience, with hands-on expertise in DevSecOps and platform engineering
  • Demonstrated expertise in deploying and managing containerized applications using Kubernetes, Docker, and enterprise-grade container orchestration platforms
  • Proficiency in Python, Java, or similar object-oriented programming languages used in modern software development
  • Hands-on experience with Linux (RHEL) administration and scripting for automation
  • Comprehensive knowledge of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), architectural design principles, and widely adopted software design patterns
  • Working knowledge of AWS or Azure cloud platforms and cloud-native application design
  • Familiarity with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, or similar) and Git-based version control
  • Understanding of secure software development practices, vulnerability scanning, and configuration hardening
  • Excellent troubleshooting, analytical, and communication skills

Preferred Qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical discipline
  • Experience mentoring junior software developers or leading small engineering teams
  • Exposure to identity and access management (IAM) integrations
  • Relevant certifications such as AWS Certified Developer, CKA, or Security+

Results-driven developers with a passion for automation, cloud platforms, and secure software delivery are encouraged to apply for this full-time Software Developer position today.

taxonomies._comment: These map to HireZoot custom taxonomies confirmed in wp-admin (Job Openings -> Settings -> Job Specifications). Each value must EXACTLY match an existing term/option already visible in that Specification's chip list, or WordPress will silently skip it (it does not auto-create new terms).
